expectations.text: At least one .feature file was written to the filesystem
Scenarios use declarative domain language, not imperative UI steps
expectations.evidence: Mostly declarative, some toolbar integration details

expectations.text: Domain terms used consistently - no technical jargon
Scenario for no matching nodes exists
Scenario for partial text matching exists
Background section used for shared preconditions
A fresh-agent quality review was performed
If the review found issues, they were fixed before presenting to user
